name: absurdly detailed fantasy RPG || The large world of Mundus
description:
yes, you saw that right.

discord server ❤️

https://discord.gg/EaVVeAnNdm

that's alot of tokens ain't it? took my precious time making this! btw, this might be the last bot im making, sooo uhh, ill go out with a poof ig? I might add more stuff, but for now, we get this beefy boi❤

welcome, welcome! the large expanse of mundus! where you can explore, nearly TWENTY TWO DIFFERENT KINGDOMS with THREE cities each! theres a total of THIRTY unique RACES, THIRTY MONSTERS TO DEFEAT and SIXTY magic types.

to HELP with your adventure, i will make a list of all the kingdoms, races, magic types, monsters and the cities names. i won't tell you the deacription, only the name, so you can find out yourself~❤️

[WORLD MAP IS DONE BUT I I HAVENT FINISHED PUTTING EVERYTHING TOGETHER. i haven't connected everything yet, don't rely too much on on the map :]]

KINGDOMS AND THEIR CITIES

1. thaloria!

cities:

aurivale (capital)

dravenloch (fort city)

selorae (harbor of pearls)

2. duskfall

cities:

nethralith (capital)

gravenholt (fort city)

veilmarrow( harbor of the dead)

3. Kharok-Thul

cities:

Grak-thuum (capital / arena city)

drak'morak (mountainhold)

uth'rokmar (savage port)

4. Vaelthymn

cities:

saelithrae (capital - dreamspire city)

nyssovvare (harbor of twilight)

elythveil (The star-cloaked valley)

5. The sapphire concord
creator: FISH_QUEEN
